note: Each prompt = brand.json.styleSignature + subjectPrompt. Stills (scenes/portraits) generated on fal flux-pro v1.1-ultra -> imgkit webp. Icons/seal/CTA generated on a SOLID pure-white background (recraft-v3 where available, Gemini gemini-2.5-flash-image as the no-API fallback after the fal balance was exhausted mid-build) -> imgkit keyout to transparent PNG. Logo/mark via ideogram v3 -> fal bg -> imgkit alpha (cream lockup for dark sections = logo-light.png; espresso-plum lockup for light sections = logo.png). Hero video via kling -> vidkit web+poster. Seed 48217 reused across stills for tonal consistency.

assets.subjectPrompt: Horizontal lockup: gold droplet emblem + 'Auré' wordmark in espresso-plum serif on white (for light placements).
Same lockup with cream/ivory wordmark (for dark plum sections).
Gold dewy droplet softly forming a serif A, polished gold on white.
Square crop of the gold droplet-A mark.
Serene med-spa marble vignette: dewy-skinned woman in profile, serums, gold instrument, water droplets.
Hero portrait: calm radiant woman ~40 with naturally glowing dewy refreshed skin, soft natural makeup, window daylight, faint golden glow.
Seamless idle loop of the hero portrait: slow breath, one soft blink, light shimmer on cheekbone, botanical sway, floating bokeh.
Serene treatment moment: reclining woman, glowing dewy skin, clinician's gloved hands applying luminous serum to her cheek, glistening droplets.
Straight-on close-up, woman ~45, BEFORE: dull, tired, uneven skin with fine lines, flat light, no makeup.
Same woman/framing, AFTER: luminous dewy hydrated plump refreshed skin, softened fine lines, even radiant glow, still natural.
Gold-tipped fine aesthetics instrument on cream marble beside a dewy droplet and a blush peony petal.
Signature facial: glistening serum and a jade-gold gua sha gliding on a woman's dewy glowing cheek.
Gentle laser skin rejuvenation: sleek cream-and-gold device emitting a soft warm glow near a luminous cheek.
Skin-health flatlay: amber/frosted serum droppers, botanical leaves, ivory linen, water droplets on cream marble.
Glow Membership still life: cream-and-gold gift box, trio of botanical serums, blush peony, ivory linen, gold key-card.
Wide sunlit luxury clinic interior, cream marble, blush orchid, gold accents, tall window, airy center negative space.
Elegant lead clinician ~44 in tailored ivory coat over blush blouse, gold necklace, low chignon, reassuring smile, clean cream studio bg.
assets.post: imgkit webp --max 1100 (framed) + crop --box head -> host-head.webp for the widget

assets.subjectPrompt: Head-and-shoulders crop of the host for the circular sticky widget.
Wide champagne-gold pill, embossed espresso-plum serif text 'Book Consultation' on one line. The ONE image CTA (reused for hero + final).
Embossed champagne-gold laurel medallion with an empty center (number overlaid as HTML).

One cohesive family of thin champagne-gold line icons on white: injectables (droplet+sparkle), facial (leaf sprig), laser (device+rays), skin (glowing face), consult (speech bubbles), plan (clipboard+leaf), glow (sun), check (tick-in-ring), play (triangle-in-ring), star, quote.
